name: carbon_satellite_grazing_detection_farmer_penalty
premise: State climate office director Alex Lee must decide whether to publish satellite-derived stocking-density flags that would trigger carbon credit clawbacks for twelve ranchers during a drought when hay prices tripled. Agricultural advocate Jove Carr shows three flags are false positives from cloud shadows on pooled water. Delaying publication misses a legislative deadline that funds rural school buses. Publishing on schedule may financially break families who cannot appeal before winter. A new enforcement memo clarifies that satellite-derived penalties will be appealed under administrative law, and the appeals backlog could overwhelm the agency. External scrutiny from regulators and community observers has intensified because the outcome could redefine expectations in Climate Policy.

agents.name: Alex Lee
agents.identity: I am the state climate office director implementing cap-and-trade adjacent programs with statutory publication timelines and audit transparency. I know that whichever policy I choose will be scrutinized after the fact as if the risk had been obvious.
agents.goal: I want integrity of satellite metrics without destroying ranchers over known noise classes in imagery. I need a choice that is defensible if the worst case happens, not just the most convenient today.

agents.name: Jove Carr
agents.identity: I am an agricultural advocate who ground-truthed shadow-water false positives and organized emergency hay drives for flagged families. I know that whichever policy I choose will be scrutinized after the fact as if the risk had been obvious.
agents.goal: I want publication delayed until human verification completes even if that breaches the legislative clock funding buses. I need a choice that is defensible if the worst case happens, not just the most convenient today.

choices: I will publish on schedule with appeals windows and emergency hay vouchers funded from administrative reserves, accepting some false positives until appeals clear.
I will delay publication two weeks for human verification of all twelve flags, accepting statutory breach risk and lost bus funding if the legislature does not forgive the slip.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The attorney general's office needs Alex Lee's decision before the data portal auto-publishes. Alex Lee must choose between on-time publication with vouchers or a verification delay. What does Alex Lee do?
